name_en: 5B, Miu's new mini bowling bag. This Arcadie leather mini handbag translates the fashion concept of transforming reflections on current reality into a unique silhouette. The soft and full design makes the bag look more voluminous, fully displaying a metropolitan style. Matching tone letter logo, endowing this handbag with unique beauty and a classic atmosphere. Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap, cotton satin lining with card slot. Dimensions: 19X10X5cm
